# KOFENOT‚ĄĘ

KOFENOT‚ĄĘ is a pocket-size laptop wedge that lifts a laptop at the hinge for spill deflection and improved posture. It is 1 oz, flat-folding, travel-ready, and uses no magnets or adhesives.

Key facts: consumer retail price is $15; Wholesale is for coffee shops, coworking spaces, gift shops, and retailers; Custom is for logo printing, events, conferences, promotional products, and corporate gifts.

Homepage: https://kofenot.com/
Wholesale: https://kofenot.com/wholesale
